name: standards-refresh.sh crawl writes a per-refresh manifest recording every URL considered with its status and skip reason including overlong URLs
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r39-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/docs $OUT/out && LONG=$(printf 'x%.0s' $(seq 1 2100)); printf '

Doc

Record the crawl trail

Every refresh must leave an auditable manifest of the URLs it considered.

p1 long' "$LONG" > $OUT/docs/index.html && printf '

P1

Linked page guidance rule

The linked page carries one distinct guidance statement.

' > $OUT/docs/p1.html && cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; M=$(ls "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/.claude-tdd-pro/crawls/"r39-src-*.jsonl | head -1); [ -f "$M" ] && grep -q '"status": "fetched"' "$M" && grep -q 'url-too-long' "$M" && grep -q 'manifest=' e.err && echo crawl-manifest-records-trail 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
